name: erlang
notes: Functions are split between fun_decl (multi-clause container) and function_clause (each `name(args) -> body;` clause). cr_clause is shared between case and receive expressions. Queries hand-derived from grammar.js + node-types.json — upstream ships only highlights.scm.

queries.tags:
(fun_decl (function_clause name: (atom) @name)) @definition.function
(module_attribute name: (atom) @name) @definition.module
(record_decl name: (atom) @name) @definition.class
(type_alias (type_name name: (atom) @name)) @definition.type
(opaque (type_name name: (atom) @name)) @definition.type
(spec fun: (atom) @name) @definition.interface
(callback fun: (atom) @name) @definition.interface
queries.refs:
(call expr: (atom) @name) @reference.call
(remote fun: (atom) @name) @reference.call
(record_name name: (atom) @name) @reference.type
(macro_call_expr name: (_) @name) @reference.call
(import_attribute module: (atom) @name) @reference.import
(behaviour_attribute name: (atom) @name) @reference.import
